name: finish-and-cleanup
description: Standardize the tail of a work session — PR merge → deploy watch → smoke check → worklog → worktree/branch/resource cleanup → main refresh — as a stepwise checklist where each step proceeds only after the previous one is confirmed. Repo-neutral: merge base, deploy trigger, and smoke method come from a fill-in per-project table or the repo's own CLAUDE.md / workflows.
